location: On a body just past the wooden bridge in the Village of the Albinaurics, Liurnia of the Lakes.

source.name: Corpse across the bridge, Village of the Albinaurics

tactics: From the Village of the Albinaurics grace, cross the well area and the wooden bridge over the water.
The body holding the sword sits near the edge just past the bridge.
Low-level Albinauric villagers patrol the area — easy to avoid or dispatch.
lore: Fashioned from pure crystal in a way no human craftsman could replicate, this blade hums with intelligence-based sorcery — likely a relic of the reclusive Crystalians, who are said to still await their creator's return.

builds.name: Int/Str hybrid
builds.why: D Strength / D Intelligence scaling lets it double as a serviceable magic damage dealer while still hitting reasonably hard in melee.
